getProvider(bytes32).details: Argument is `nodeId`. Name kept for ABI compatibility with existing integrations.

operatorNodes(address).details: Exposed as a function instead of `public mapping(...)` because Solidity maps-to-array getters use `(operator, index)`, not a full slice.

params.initialEncryptionPubkey: Optional X25519 pubkey (`bytes32(0)` = opt-out). Non-zero installs version 1 on-chain.

chillNode(bytes32).notice: Active → Chilled: stops new sessions (`supportsTier`). Existing escrow sessions may still settle.

markDefunct(bytes32).notice: Chilled → Defunct: requires zero open sessions in the configured escrow.

operatorNodes(address).notice: All node IDs controlled by `operator` (order matches registration).

purgeDefunctNode(bytes32).notice: Owner-only: removes a defunct node's storage so `nodeId` may be registered again.

registerNode(bytes32,address,bool,bool,s.notice: Register a node identity; caller becomes the operator. `payout == address(0)` defaults to `msg.sender`.

revokeEncryptionKey(bytes32,uint32).notice: Mark a key version as unusable; if revoking the active version, headline pubkey is cleared (current = 0).

rotateEncryptionKey(bytes32,bytes32,uint.notice: Replace the active encryption key; previous key remains valid for verification until `gracePeriodSecs` elapse.

setSettlementEscrow(address).notice: Wire the settlement escrow used for `openSessionCountByNode` reads (e.g. after both contracts are deployed).

setTEEProof(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Attestation service records TEE evidence; Tier `TEE_VERIFIED` requires a non-zero hash (`supportsTier`).

settlementEscrow().notice: Escrow reporting open session counts per node; set by owner after deploy.

supportsTier(bytes32,uint8).notice: Used by escrow and off-chain aggregators to enforce tier eligibility.
